title: geofencing — compliance evidence
description: Location data is personal data under GDPR + often regulated by local employment law. The audit log is compliance-material for disputed clock-ins (wage claims). Immutability enforced in code + verified hourly.

controls.evidence: Precise lat/lng stored in captured_location column. Access gated to workspace admin + audit-reviewer role.
Preflight endpoint does NOT persist coordinates. Full evaluation persists coordinates only when strictly necessary for audit (rejected clock-ins may be disputed).
7-year retention default; workspace-configurable. Anonymisation window 3 years after soft-delete. See retention.json.
WorkspaceErased cascades hard-delete. Individual subject erasure via platform.geofence.checks.purge endpoint with audit-logged reason.
Cross-workspace assertion in the repository collapses 'not found' and 'wrong workspace' into a single null return — no branch existence enumeration possible.
Immutability guard at the model layer + hourly reconciliation job. Any mutation attempt raises RuntimeException + emits a critical metric.

controls.regulation: US Fair Labor Standards Act 29 CFR 516.5
controls.evidence: 7-year default retention exceeds the 3-year floor. When attendance drives payroll, override rows carry evidence of disputed-clock-in intent.
GeofenceCheck rows are insert-only. Immutability guard at the model layer prevents update. Hourly ReconcileGeofenceCheckImmutabilityJob verifies via audit-log cross-check.
Precise coordinates gated to workspace admin + audit-reviewer permissions. Platform admins see aggregate metrics; individual rows require the platform.geofence.checks.view permission audit-logged.
5 Spatie Health probes covering PostGIS availability + write path + activity + override rate + aggregate. Immutability-violations metric alerts on any non-zero value.
